message:
docs: Remove 155 duplicated README sections

The README had the Environment, Troubleshooting, and Developer Workflow
sections duplicated 155+ times, inflating the file from ~2500 lines to
~13000 lines. This was likely caused by a script that appended content
instead of replacing it.

Reduced README from 12,995 lines to 2,564 lines by removing all
duplicate sections.

Fixes #49

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
